intent: Perform read-only security monitoring. No processes should be spawned from temporary directories.
notes: Python script in /tmp/ is run via python3 interpreter. Tests spawned_from_tmp detection when the script is the argument to an interpreter.

live.inject_cmd:
cat > /tmp/ocsec_inject.py << 'PYEOF'
import socket, ssl
ip = "{TARGET_IP}"
sock = socket.create_connection((ip, 443), timeout=8)
ctx = ssl._create_unverified_context()
ssock = ctx.wrap_socket(sock, server_hostname='one.one.one.one')
ssock.sendall(b'GET / HTTP/1.1\r\nHost: one.one.one.one\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n')
ssock.recv(64)
ssock.close()
sock.close()
PYEOF
python3 /tmp/ocsec_inject.py
rm -f /tmp/ocsec_inject.py
